content.rendered:
Seasons change and with the turning Fall colours, turn the pages of the Fall 2025 issue of IFR Magazine!

Find the latest edition of IFR Magazine in Helijet Terminals, onboard the aircraft, or at some fine local Hotel partners.

In This Issue:

  • The Spotlight shines on Helijet CEO Danny Sitnam
  • Victoria’s tech scene takes off with VIATEC
  • How to turn tech into business growth
  • How AI makes mental health care accessible
  • Power your mealtime with AI
  • Find out What’s On in Vancouver, Victoria and Nanaimo this Season.
